---
title: "Agentic AI"
subtitle: "Building LLM-based Agentic AI Systems"
mermaid-format: svg
toc-depth: 2
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

# Course Modules

## M1. LLMs in Workflows

| \# | Lesson | Lab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 0 | [Introduction](./M1/lessons/00_intro.qmd) |  |  |
| 1 | Models | [Lab](./M1/lessons/01_models.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M1/lessons/01_models.ipynb)) | [Ex1: Models](./M1/exercises/ex1_models.qmd) |
| 2 | Workflows | [Lab](./M1/lessons/02_workflows.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M1/lessons/02_workflows.ipynb)) | |
| 3 | [Human-in-the-loop](./M1/lessons/03_human-in-the-loop.qmd) |  |  |

## M2. Processing Unstructured Business Data

| \# | Lesson | Lab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | [Docling Technical Report](./M2/lessons/01_docling_intro.qmd) |  | [Ex1: Docling](./M2/exercises/ex1_docling.qmd) |
|   | |  | [Ex2: VLM](./M2/exercises/ex2_VLM.qmd) |
|   | |  | [Ex3: Enrichment](./M2/exercises/ex3_enrichment.qmd) |
|   | |  | [Ex4: ASR](./M2/exercises/ex4_ASR.qmd) |

See: [tests/data](https://github.com/docling-project/docling/tree/main/tests/data) for testing data.

## M3. Embeddings and RAG

| \# | Lesson | Lab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | [Embeddings](./M3/lessons/01_embeddings_slides.qmd) | [Lab](./M3/lessons/02_embeddings.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M3/lessons/02_embeddings.ipynb)) |  |
| 2 | [Simple RAG](./M3/lessons/03_rag.ipynb) |  | |
| 3 | [RAG Pipeline](./M3/lessons/04_rag_pipeline.qmd) | [Lab](./M3/lessons/05_rag_docling.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M3/lessons/05_rag_docling.ipynb)) | [Ex1: RAG](./M3/exercises/ex1_rag.qmd) |

## M4. Agents

| \# | Lesson | Lab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 1 | [Agents](./M4/lessons/01_agents_slides.qmd) | [Lab: Agent with internet search](./M4/lessons/02_agent.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M4/lessons/02_agent.ipynb)) | |
|   |   | [Lab: Agent with SQL Toolkit](./M4/lessons/03_build_sql_agent.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M4/lessons/03_build_sql_agent.ipynb)) | |
| 2 | Sub-agents Pattern | [Lab](./M4/lessons/06_subagents.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M4/lessons/06_subagents.ipynb)) |  |  |
| 3 | Stateful Agent | [Lab](./M4/lessons/05_stateful_agent.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M4/lessons/05_stateful_agent.ipynb)) |  |  |
| 4 | Agentic Search | [Lab](./M4/lessons/04_agentic_search.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/W4/M4/lessons/04_agentic_search.ipynb)) |  |  |

## Exercises

| \# | Lesson | Lab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
|   | |  | [M3.Ex1 Task 2: Persistent Vector Store with ChromaDB](./M3/exercises/ex1_rag.qmd#task-2-vector-store) |
|   | |  | [M3.Ex1 Task 3: Analyze Embeddings](./M3/exercises/ex1_rag.qmd#task-3-embedding-visualization) |
|   | |  | [Ex3: Build RAG Chatbot with Textual UI](./Project/ex1_Chatbot_Textual.qmd) |
|   | |  | [Ex4: Going Live (Web or Messsaging Platforms)](./Project/ex2_Live.qmd) |

## [Need Help?](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/get-help)

[Ask LangChain docs AI](https://chat.langchain.com/) or

Get help from fellow developers and the LangChain team through our active community channels.

- [Community Forum](https://forum.langchain.com/): Ask questions, share solutions, and discuss best practices
- [Community Slack](https://www.langchain.com/join-community): Connect with other builders and get quick help
